items.name_en: Lady's latest 5-compartment bow🎀 Diana bag, crafted from lambskin, a must-have Diana bag for everyone😍. items.name_cn:
Sakura Pink in stock!!️
D-joy latest mini series. If micro is too small and small is too big, look here. The new mini size fits large phones perfectly. This size looks more refined, a major hit. The bag comes with two shoulder straps and multiple carrying styles, looking beautiful and chic. Classic quilted design paired with cowhide patent leather, elegant and fashionable, a daily essential.
size:19*5.5*10.5cm

items.name_cn:
!!️
Nomad Clutch Lunch Box Series
Upgraded lunch box bag, who understands the joy of having a shoulder strap included
The added adjustable long strap greatly improves practicality
Simple and soft silhouette, very lightweight for personal use
The hardware letter logo on the strap is another highlight
This vintage print lunch box really understands daily life
Capacity fits everything needed for commuting
Classic Oblique denim gets better with age
Pairs perfectly with T-shirts and knitwear for a relaxed, premium look
Definitely a practical bag you can carry for years
size:22*13*9.5cm
